revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Expand Japanese]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->
#redirect[[en:Template:Expand Japanese]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]<!--redirecting existing page-->

revision.comment: Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:wikipedia>Numberguy6|wikipedia>Numberguy6]]
Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects in namespace Template]] to [[Category:qq-{{subst:NAMESPACE}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this to force an update since the ambox redirect is messing with things
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Japanese here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_Japanese for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->
{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B=
{{Expand language
|langcode=ja
|otherarticle={{{1|}}}
|section={{{section|}}}
|date={{{date|}}}
|fa={{{fa|}}}
|topic={{#switch: {{lc:{{{topic}}}}}
 | anime | manga = Anime and manga
 | bio = Biography
 | cult | culture = Culture
 | geo = Geography
 | gov = Government and politics
 | hist = History
 | mil = Military
 | sci | tech | scitech = Science and technology
 | sport = Sports
 | struct = Building and structure
 | transp | transport = Transport
 | vg = Video game
}}
|nodoc={{{nodoc|}}}
|no interwiki={{{no interwiki|}}}
}}
}}
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
